libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Set net.sf.ehcache.skipUpdateCheck=true in tests, or ensure all CacheManager/configuration creation uses updateCheck(false)/updateCheck="false". Use temporary diskStore paths for disk persistence tests. If using Bitronix, point bitronix.tm.configuration at a temporary properties file with bitronix.tm.disableJmx=true and bitronix.tm.journal=null, then shut down the transaction manager and clear the property after each test.

deterministic_setup.reason: ehcache-core declares JTA as provided and exposes/uses javax.transaction types in transaction APIs.
Ehcache documentation describes JTA transactions under an application-server or third-party transaction manager such as Bitronix; DefaultTransactionManagerLookup coverage needs a concrete manager.
Bitronix references javax.jms classes through optional JMS support, so the JMS API prevents classpath/native-image missing-type issues when Bitronix is analyzed.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8877 [Automation] native-image run fails for net.sf.ehcache:ehcache-core:2.5.0; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Do not require a Docker service for normal ehcache-core coverage; avoid Terracotta clustered-cache scenarios unless explicitly adding a Terracotta server setup.

Hibernate and servlet integration classes are present but depend on provided containers/APIs; broad tests that load those integrations may require additional setup and are not necessary for core coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Ehcache core has meaningful local-cache coverage without services, but its transaction APIs rely on provided JTA and a real transaction manager; existing coverage also needs update checks disabled to avoid network/background behavior.
